summary: Editable D2 JSON draft for human review.
general_information: The EL COQUÍ is a con-ro ship built by VT Halter Marine, designed for the Puerto Rico trade. It has a length of 219.5m and a beam of 32.24m, with a deadweight of 26,410dwt. The vessel is powered by an 8S70ME-C8.2-GI engine and has a service speed of 22knots. It features four vehicle decks and can accommodate up to 387 cars or higher vehicles.

The local AI did not return usable JSON, so the app created a structured editable draft from parser data.

standard.name: DNV_GMOD_INTERNAL_DEFAULT
standard.description: Default maritime taxonomy used by the application for vessel data extraction, validation and classification.
standard.rule: AI must classify extracted data using this taxonomy first. Missing categories must be proposed as extensions, not invented as final nodes.
